title: Git-shorthand for skill sources
scope: v1 ships skills-only. AI hooks + MCP servers via Git still go through manifest.json at repo root. SSH auth and sparse-checkout deferred.
completionNote: src/library_registry/url_parser.rs handles git+https:// and github: schemes with mandatory @<ref> pin + #<subpath> + safety refusals (no .., no absolute paths). src/library_registry/git_fetch.rs clones via git CLI, walks SKILL.md, parses YAML frontmatter, synthesizes Manifest. sync() dispatches by scheme. Skills installer's fetch path now branches on file:// URLs (read from git cache) vs HTTPS (existing path). 14 new unit tests across URL parsing, frontmatter splitting, SKILL.md building, mutable-ref detection, walker, file:// reading.
follow_up: Sparse-checkout for large repos (--depth 1 helps but not enough on huge monorepos)
gitlab: and bitbucket: shorthands (architecture supports; just wire dispatch)
AI hooks + MCP servers from git via repo-root manifest.json (works today but undocumented)
Per-ref disk cache expiry (today: cache lives until jarvy library clean)
